title: hoya odorata subsp. odorata
intro: Hoya odorata subsp. odorata is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the fragrant hoya or the odorata hoya. It is a type of evergreen climber native to Southeast Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Hoya odorata subsp. odorata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
